---
title: "Talks & Policy"
toc: true
---

## Policy engagement

**May 2025** · Invited roundtable speaker, Lauterpacht Centre for International Law, Cambridge — legal frameworks for climate and biodiversity policy

**May 2025** · Expert contributor, *Co-design the Future(s) of Payments for Ecosystem Services in the EU* — stakeholder workshop on EU PES scheme design

**April 2025** · Invited panellist, ThinkForest: *Ask a Scientist — Carbon Farming in the European Forest Sector* — science–policy panel on carbon farming implementation

**October 2024** · Invited expert, ThinkForest: *What Do We Know About Carbon Farming*, Permanent Representation of Austria to the EU, Brussels — presented Chiti et al. (2024) to EU Commission officials; roundtable on the EU Carbon Removals Certification Framework

## Conference presentations

**September 2026** · XXVII Annual BIOECON Conference, St John's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation

**June–July 2026** · 7th World Congress of Environmental and Resource Economists (WCERE), Nova School of Business and Economics, Cascais — oral presentation

**March 2026** · 3rd European Carbon Farming Summit, Padua — oral presentation

**June 2025** · International Symposium on Climate, Finance and Sustainability (ISCFS), Paris — oral presentation

**October 2024** · LabEx ARBRE Day, INRAE Champenoux, Nancy — oral presentation

**September 2024** · XXV Annual BIOECON Conference, King's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation

**July 2024** · 26th IUFRO World Congress, Stockholm — poster

**June 2024** · 8th Workshop on Non-Market Valuation (WONV), University of Leeds — oral presentation

**June 2024** · 2nd Action versus Inaction Facing Climate Change (AICC) Conference, Strasbourg — poster

**June 2023** · 28th Annual Conference of the European Association of Environmental and Resource Economists (EAERE), Limassol — oral presentation

## Seminars

**June 2025** · Research seminar, Centre for Environment, Energy and Natural Resource Governance (C-EENRG), University of Cambridge

## Teaching

**2024** · *Regulation of Ecosystem Services — Market-Based Instruments and Payments for Ecosystem Services*, AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy

**2024** · *Introduction to Stated Preference Methods for Ecosystem Services Valuation*, AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy
